title: openssl security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[1:1.1.1k-14]
- Backport fix for Out-of-bounds read & write in RFC 3211 KEK Unwrap
  Fix CVE-2025-9230
  Resolves: RHEL-128613
- Fix bug for ticket_lifetime_hint exceed issue
  Resolves: RHEL-119891
full_text:
[1:1.1.1k-14]
- Backport fix for Out-of-bounds read & write in RFC 3211 KEK Unwrap
  Fix CVE-2025-9230
  Resolves: RHEL-128613
- Fix bug for ticket_lifetime_hint exceed issue
  Resolves: RHEL-119891

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0337.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-9230.html
